title: ADH minimum-PMI Calculator
description: Calculate a minimum post-mortem interval by accumulating degree-hours backward from discovery until cumulative ADH meets the threshold for a chosen blowfly species and larval stage.
creator: Forensic Science Intelligent Textbook
subject: Forensic Science
Forensic Entomology
Accumulated Degree Hours
Post-mortem Interval
Decomposition
bloomLevel: Apply (L3) — calculate minimum post-mortem interval from accumulated degree hours.

educational.topic: Accumulated degree hours and minimum post-mortem interval
learningObjectives: Calculate accumulated degree-hours from a temperature record and base temperature.
Estimate a minimum post-mortem interval from cumulative ADH and a stage threshold.
Explain how temperature and base temperature affect the PMI estimate.
educational.prerequisites: Arithmetic with averages; concept of insect life stages

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Calculator: set temperatures and base, choose species/stage, run an accumulation sweep, read mPMI
pedagogical.assessment: Students compute degree-hours and verify the running total against the cumulative curve
pedagogical.modelType: Degree-hour accumulation model with threshold crossing
controls: click a bar to select a day
